title: Specialization · RecSys deep dive (Ranking / Predictions)
focus: Two-tower retrieval, multi-task ranking, position bias, key papers.

items.label: YouTube multi-task ranking system (canonical)
interviewQuestions: Walk me through the YouTube multi-task ranking paper.
How does multi-task learning balance engagement vs satisfaction?
How would you weigh tasks when objectives conflict?

items.label: PAL — position-bias aware learning for CTR
interviewQuestions: What is position bias and why does PAL care?
How does PAL correct for position bias at training time?
How would you test if your CTR model has position bias?

items.label: Sampling-bias-corrected two-tower (Google)
interviewQuestions: Why does the two-tower architecture work at YouTube scale?
When does a two-tower model lose to a unified ranker?

items.label: Eugene Yan — System design for discovery
interviewQuestions: Walk me through the canonical 3-stage discovery architecture.
How do you handle cold-start at each stage?
What's the role of an exploration budget in discovery?

items.label: Two common collaborative-filtering techniques + trade-offs
interviewQuestions: Compare two collaborative-filtering techniques and their strengths / weaknesses.
When does collaborative filtering fail catastrophically?
How would you combine collaborative + content-based signals?

items.label: Design a 3-stage recommender for short-form video
Sketch a multi-task head (engagement + satisfaction + diversity)

interviewQuestions: Compare two collaborative-filtering techniques and their strengths / weaknesses.
How do you correct for position bias when training on click logs?
How would a multi-task head balance watch-time vs satisfaction signals?
Walk me through cold-start handling for a brand-new creator.
